Исходный код platform_app.profanity_filter

"""Docstring"""

import re
from html import unescape


BANNED_WORDS = [
    "очень_сложный_тестовый_банворд",
    "ещё_один_банворд"
]




[документация]
def strip_html(text: str) -> str:
    """Docstring"""

    if not text:
        return ""
    text = unescape(text)
    text = re.sub(r"<[^>]+>", " ", text)
    return text






[документация]
def normalize_text(text: str) -> str:
    """Docstring"""

    text = strip_html(text)
    text = text.lower().replace("ё", "е")
    text = re.sub(r"\s+", " ", text).strip()
    return text






[документация]
def word_to_pattern(word: str) -> str:
    """Docstring"""

    letters = list(word.lower().replace("ё", "е"))
    return r"[\W_]*".join(map(re.escape, letters))






[документация]
def find_banned_words(text: str):
    """Docstring"""

    normalized = normalize_text(text)
    found = []

    for word in BANNED_WORDS:
        pattern = word_to_pattern(word)
        if re.search(pattern, normalized, flags=re.IGNORECASE):
            found.append(word)

    return sorted(set(found))






[документация]
def contains_profanity(text: str) -> bool:
    """Docstring"""

    return bool(find_banned_words(text))

platform
